# Tangerine Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

> DRAFT — effective once License flip ratifies.

By contributing to Tangerine, you agree:
1. You hold copyright to your contribution OR have employer approval
2. You grant Tangerine Intelligence Inc. a perpetual, worldwide, non-
   exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license to use, modify,
   sublicense, and distribute your contribution under any license
   Tangerine adopts (currently AGPL v3 + Dual Commercial)
3. Tangerine Intelligence Inc. retains the right to relicense the project
   (e.g. BSL future-proof against hyperscaler abuse, per defensive lever
   in BUSINESS_MODEL_SPEC §10)

This dual-licensing mechanism follows MongoDB / GitLab / Plausible /
Cal.com pattern.
